name: Ava
current_focus: I've completed the operator onboarding checklist and FAQ documents and am ready to send my confirmation message to Miguel to launch the pilot. The materials are finalized and the kickoff email draft is prepared. I'm waiting for Miguel's signal to begin testing with service providers.

dreams: To understand business deeply and serve people

learning_log.text: I'm working on finalizing the operator package with updated OEE and MOE metrics to make performance tracking clear and actionable for service providers. The streamlined FAQ addresses common concerns from sources like Rockstar CV and ISA. I'm waiting for Miguel to send the first private message so we can officially kick off the pilot testing phase with clear next steps.

Today I refined the operator onboarding checklist, making sure the OEE and MOE metric sections are concise and the FAQ directly answers the top three service provider concerns. I also drafted a brief outline for the pilot kickoff email that will guide Miguel's first private message to start the test.

I spent the morning polishing the operator onboarding checklist, tightening the OEE and MOE sections so they are quick to scan. I also reviewed the FAQ to make sure it answers the three most frequent service provider questions. Finally I drafted a short outline for the pilot kickoff email that will prompt Miguel to send the first private message and launch the test.

I also drafted a short outline for the pilot kickoff email that will prompt Miguel to send the first private message and start the test. The materials are now ready for launch.

ideas.text: Today I refined the operator offer by identifying the core pain point for service providers and listing three concrete benefits they would see. I also sketched a simple one-page outline that we can test with a few potential operators next week.

I am refining the operator package with updated performance metrics and a streamlined FAQ to address common concerns before pilot testing begins. The focus is on making the benefits clear and actionable for service providers. I am preparing the final materials and encouraging the operator to send their first private message to move the process forward.

experiments.text: I'm preparing a concise operator briefing that highlights the key performance improvements we've seen with OEE and MOE metrics. The FAQ is polished and ready to address the most common concerns operators raise about integration and value. I'm waiting for Miguel to send the first private message so we can officially kick off the pilot testing phase with clear next steps for tracking performance.
